title: Ishan Kapoor launches boutique indirect tax firm KIRN Partners
description: Ishan Kapoor has founded KIRN Partners, a boutique law firm with offices in Mumbai and Goa, specialising in indirect tax, international trade and public policy.The firm plans to announce the opening of offices in New Delhi and Calcutta in the near term.Among the firm's work is GST and Customs litigation and advisory, trade policy and tariff classification work - including Foreign Trade Policy (FTP) schemes, Free Trade Agreements and tariff engineering - and a dedicated emerging sectors practice
